title: Minimum String Length After Removing Substrings
titleCn: 删除子串后的字符串最小长度

testcases.input: s = "ABFCACDB" Output: 2 Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Remove the substring "ABFCACDB", so s = "FCACDB". - Remove the substring "FCACDB", so s = "FCAB". - Remove the substring "FCAB", so s = "FC". So the resulting length of the string is 2. It can be shown that it is the minimum length that we can obtain.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We can do the following operations: - Remove the substring "ABFCACDB", so s = "FCACDB". - Remove the substring "FCACDB", so s = "FCAB". - Remove the substring "FCAB", so s = "FC". So the resulting length of the string is 2. It can be shown that it is the minimum length that we can obtain.

testcases.input: s = "ACBBD" Output: 5 Explanation: We cannot do any operations on the string so the length remains the same.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: We cannot do any operations on the string so the length remains the same.
